installPrompt.title: Install Below OP
installPrompt.iosBody: Tap the Share icon, then choose “Add to Home Screen” to install.
installPrompt.body: Get instant access from your home screen, with offline support.

footer.copyright: © 2026 Below OP · Demo build · Not for production use.

about.title: About Below OP
about.whatBody: Below OP is a curated, filterable feed of Dubai property inventory listed below Original Price (OP). New finds are broadcast to our public Telegram channel <telegram>@DubaiPropertydeal</telegram>; a WhatsApp Business 1:1 channel is in the queue. Tap a unit to inquire and our broker will follow up.
about.freshnessBody: Listings are ingested from leading Dubai listing portals via a scheduled scraper. Live unit count and last-update timestamp are shown on the listings page. Today the table reflects the most recent ingestion run.
about.broadcastBody: The fastest way to see every new below-OP find: <telegram>Telegram → @DubaiPropertydeal</telegram>. The same finds also post to our WhatsApp Channel manually shortly after.
about.privacyBody: We collect only what you submit (name, WhatsApp number, optional message). Leads are stored to fulfil your inquiry and routed to a licensed broker. You can request deletion at any time per UAE PDPL.

alerts.title: Get Below-OP alerts in your inbox.
alerts.subtitle: Free. Unsubscribe anytime. Max 5 alerts/day. Telegram channel is live; WhatsApp 1:1 coming soon.
alerts.channelsBody: Telegram auto-posts every new find. WhatsApp Channel is updated by hand shortly after. No sign-up, no form.
alerts.channelsFiltered: Want the alerts filtered to specific areas, bed counts, or drop %? Use the form below for a personalised feed.
alerts.whatTitle: What should we alert you about?
alerts.consent: I agree to the privacy notice and terms.
alerts.errNoChannel: Please pick at least one channel.
alerts.errNoContact: Please fill in the contact details for your selected channel.
alerts.errGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again.

alertsConfirmed.whatsappBody: We just sent a message to your number. Reply <yes>YES</yes> to start receiving alerts.
alertsConfirmed.telegramBody: We just sent a confirmation link to your Telegram. Open it and tap to confirm.
alertsConfirmed.emailBody: We just sent a confirmation email. Click the link inside to start receiving alerts.

notFound.title: Page not found.
notFound.body: The unit you're looking for may have been removed or never listed.

offline.metaDescription: You are offline. Below OP will reconnect when you are back online.
offline.title: You're offline.
offline.body: We can't reach Below OP right now. Once you're back online, recently viewed listings will still be available.

legal.governingNotice: This page is provided in English only. The English version is the governing and legally binding text; any translation is for convenience.

alertPreview.title: Alert message preview
alertPreview.intro: Below OP follows the canonical broker post template: project + features + handover + dual-currency + direct WhatsApp CTA.
